user_feedback: now I want there to instead be a total of 9 levels, 3 easy levels, 3 medium levels, and 3 hard levels, can you add that fix for me? make sure the easy levels and very very easy and simple, and perhaps the medium levels can be the resued levels from level 1 and 2
analysis:
- Issue identified: Game needs to expand from 4 levels to 9 levels with difficulty progression (3 easy, 3 medium, 3 hard)
- Files affected: globals.js (maxLevel), map.js (level configurations), index.html (description text)
- Changes needed: 
  1. Update maxLevel from 4 to 9 in globals.js
  2. Expand map generation in map.js to include 9 level configurations with proper difficulty scaling
  3. Update index.html description to reflect 9 levels instead of 4
  4. Ensure easy levels (1-3) are very simple with smaller maps and fewer enemies
  5. Reuse old level 1-2 designs for medium levels (4-5)
